item.title: `cocoindex_code` usage
item.body:
```bash
$ ccc index
Project: /home/zjp/KMiri
Indexing: 3340 files listed | 0 added, 0 deleted, 0 reprocessed, 3340 unchanged, error: 0

Index stats:
  Chunks: 19076
  Files:  3340
  Languages:
    rust: 16595 chunks
    markdown: 853 chunks
    c: 821 chunks
    bash: 307 chunks
    toml: 184 chunks
    cpp: 110 chunks
    yaml: 109 chunks
    text: 48 chunks
    python: 33 chunks
    json: 16 chunks
```

```bash
# Install sqlite3 vec0 extension
$ mkdir -p ~/.sqlite_extensions && cd ~/.sqlite_extensions && curl -L 'https://github.com/asg017/sqlite-vec/releases/latest/download/install.sh' | sh
$ echo ".load /home/zjp/.sqlite_extensions/vec0" >> ~/.sqliterc

# See what files have been indexed
$ sqlite3 .cocoindex_code/target_sqlite.db "SELECT DISTINCT file_path FROM code_chunks_vec;"
```
item.bodyText:
$ ccc index
Project: /home/zjp/KMiri
Indexing: 3340 files listed | 0 added, 0 deleted, 0 reprocessed, 3340 unchanged, error: 0

Index stats:
  Chunks: 19076
  Files:  3340
  Languages:
    rust: 16595 chunks
    markdown: 853 chunks
    c: 821 chunks
    bash: 307 chunks
    toml: 184 chunks
    cpp: 110 chunks
    yaml: 109 chunks
    text: 48 chunks
    python: 33 chunks
    json: 16 chunks
# Install sqlite3 vec0 extension
$ mkdir -p ~/.sqlite_extensions && cd ~/.sqlite_extensions && curl -L 'https://github.com/asg017/sqlite-vec/releases/latest/download/install.sh' | sh
$ echo ".load /home/zjp/.sqlite_extensions/vec0" >> ~/.sqliterc

# See what files have been indexed
$ sqlite3 .cocoindex_code/target_sqlite.db "SELECT DISTINCT file_path FROM code_chunks_vec;"
